description: Discover the SELECT SOLEIL anti-bulge camisole with a built-in semi-fixed bra. Experience unparalleled comfort from super stretch seamless fabric. This wire-free tag-free hook-free design feels incredibly soft against your skin. It provides excellent support a smooth back silhouette and no visible lines under clothes. Plus it is infused with hyaluronic acid and camellia extract for skincare benefits. Join over 5000 satisfied customers and maximize your value with our special 3-piece set.
